emails.subject: UK Mobile Phone
emails.body: UK Mobile Phone For your information: Telephone No. if dialling from the USA 011-447881512535 or UK local 07881 512535 To access voice mail from the USA dial 011-44-777 533 7885 or UK local dial 44 777 533 785 You may interrupt the message by pressing "9" Global Access No is "3333" Follow the verbal prompts Please let me know if you have any questions X57373.
